parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*🧠 Gate 2 — Analysis Ready*

*Feature:* ' + $json.analysis.feature_name + '
*Guide Title:* ' + $json.analysis.guide_title + '
*User Impact:* ' + $json.analysis.user_impact + '
*Affected Panels:* ' + ($json.analysis.affected_panels || []).join(', ') + '

*What Changed:*
' + $json.analysis.what_changed + '

*What Users Can Now Do:*
' + ($json.analysis.user_actions || []).map((a, i) => (i+1) + '. ' + a).join('
') + '

*Complexity:* ' + $json.analysis.complexity } }, { type: 'actions', elements: [{ type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Approve — Generate Guide', emoji: true }, style: 'primary', url: $execution.resumeUrl, action_id: 'approve_gate2' }] }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [{ insertText: { text: $('Parse Guide').first().json.guide_content, location: { index: 1 } } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '*✅ Gate 3 — Documentation Draft Created*

*Feature:* ' + $('Parse Guide').first().json.analysis.feature_name + '
*Guide Title:* ' + $('Parse Guide').first().json.doc_title + '
*Repos:* ' + ($('Parse Guide').first().json.pr_group || []).map(p => p.repo_slug).join(', ') + '
*Requested by:* ' + $('Parse Guide').first().json.requester + ($('Parse Guide').first().json.context_hint ? '
*Hint used:* ' + $('Parse Guide').first().json.context_hint : '') + '

📄 *Draft:* ' + ($json.webViewLink || 'Check Google Drive folder') + '

👀 Ready for review → add screenshots → publish' }) }}
